
# Data-Driven (Multi-Objective) Bayesian Optimisation

**ESSAI 2026**

**Instructor:** Tinkle Chugh  
**Affiliation:** University of Exeter, UK

Welcome to the course website. Materials will be uploaded daily.

## Course Structure

- [Day 1: Intro to (multi-objective) Optimisation](days/day1.qmd)
- [Day 2: Foundations of Gaussian Processes](days/day2.qmd)
- [Day 3: Exploitation and Exploration Trade-off](days/day3.qmd)
- [Day 4: Multi-objective Bayesian Optimisation and Summary](days/day4.qmd)
